title: Senior Software Engineer - BSNL Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BSNL Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BSNL Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
